visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a close-up of a shopping cart filled with various groceries, including meat and produce. A large, colorful graphic overlay featuring the 'Costco Wholesale' logo and text in Chinese is centered on the screen. A cartoon character is visible on the left side of the overlay. The background shows the interior of a warehouse-style store with bright overhead lighting. (2) The scene transitions into a fast-paced montage of various products on store shelves or in display cases. Each shot features a specific product, such as packs of Coca-Cola, trays of sliced beef, containers of pork belly, and boxes of green tea. For every product shown, a consistent text overlay appears in the center, listing the brand, product name, original price, discount amount, and the final sale price in Chinese characters. The camera remains mostly static for each product shot, focusing directly on the packaging. (3) The montage continues through dozens of items including household goods like kitchen towels, various bottled and canned beverages, snacks, and frozen foods. The environment is consistently a brightly lit retail warehouse. Brief glimpses of other shoppers' hands or carts appear occasionally in the background, but no individuals are shown as main characters. (4) The final segment features bulk items such as packs of shampoo, cases of beer, and bottles of wine. The visual rhythm remains rapid, with each product appearing for only a few seconds. The lighting is uniform and bright throughout, typical of a supermarket setting.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Occasional hands visible handling products; silhouettes of shoppers in the background aisles.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The background consists of various sections of a Costco warehouse, including refrigerated aisles for meat and dairy, dry goods shelving units, and pallet displays of bulk beverages and household supplies.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio opens with a high-energy, fast-paced male voice speaking in Mandarin, introducing the weekly Costco specials. The tone is extremely enthusiastic and persuasive. An upbeat, major-key electronic pop track with a steady drum beat begins immediately and continues as a constant bed throughout. (2) As the narrator lists each product, he maintains a rapid-fire delivery, precisely timing the name of each item with its visual appearance. For example, he says 'Coca-Cola' exactly as the bottles appear, followed by the price. The pitch variability is high, with rising intonation at the end of many phrases to sustain excitement. (3) The background music maintains a consistent tempo around 128 BPM, providing a rhythmic pulse that matches the fast visual cuts. There are no significant pauses in the speech; as soon as one item is described, the next begins immediately. Occasional subtle 'ding' sound effects punctuate the start of new product categories. (4) The track concludes with a final energetic push as the narrator mentions alcoholic beverages, maintaining the same high arousal and positive valence until the audio cuts out cleanly at the end of the video.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a rapid-fire shopping guide and promotional advertisement for Costco's weekly discounted products. It utilizes a high-density information layout to showcase a wide variety of goods (food, beverage, household, pet) in a short amount of time, aiming to create a sense of urgency and value for potential shoppers.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of products with prices and Costco branding; narrator explicitly lists sale items.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video is a typical social-media style sales advertisement characterized by hyper-fast editing and non-stop energetic narration. It is highly effective for quick information consumption.
